zh.lifeSummary: 當William Calvert於1500年7月2日出生在英國時，他的父親Walter Calvert22歲，母親Margery Ewnes27歲。他於1525年8月20日與Marjorie Alyse de Crossland在英國越可爾拉斯可爾福結婚。他們至少是13個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1548年2月9日享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Calvert于1500年7月2日出生在英国时，他的父亲Walter Calvert22岁，母亲Margery Ewnes27岁。他于1525年8月20日与Marjorie Alyse de Crossland在英国越可爾拉斯可爾福结婚。他们至少是13个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1548年2月9日享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Calvert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): occupational name from Middle English calfhirde, from Old English (Anglian) calf ‘calf’ + hierde ‘herdsman’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Calvert was born on 2 July 1500, in England, his father, Walter Calvert, was 22 and his mother, Margery Ewnes, was 27. He married Marjorie Alyse de Crossland on 20 August 1525, in Raskelfe, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 13 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 9 February 1548, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Calvert est né le 2 juillet 1500, à Angleterre, son père, Walter Calvert, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Margery Ewnes, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Marjorie Alyse de Crossland le 20 août 1525, à Raskelfe, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 13 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 9 février 1548, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Calvert am 2. Juli 1500 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter Calvert 22 und seine Mutter Margery Ewnes 27. Er hat am 20. August 1525 in Raskelfe, Yorkshire, England Marjorie Alyse de Crossland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 13 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 9. Februar 1548 im Alter von 47 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Calvert è nato il il 2 luglio 1500 nel England, il suo padre, Walter Calvert, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Margery Ewnes, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Marjorie Alyse de Crossland il 20 agosto 1525, nel Raskelfe, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 13 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 9 febbraio 1548, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Calvertが1500年7月2日にイギリスで生まれた時，父Walter Calvertは22歳，母Margery Ewnesは27歳であった。1525年8月20日にイギリスヨークシュアイアラスケルフでMarjorie Alyse de Crosslandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも13人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1548年2月9日に47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Calvert(이)가 1500년 7월 2일 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Calvert(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Ewnes(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1525년 8월 20일 영국 요르크실르 래스켈프에서 Marjorie Alyse de Crossland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1548년 2월 9일 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.2 July 1500–9 February 1548: 2 de julho de 1500–9 de fevereiro de 1548
pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Calvert nasceu em 2 de julho de 1500, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter Calvert, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Margery Ewnes, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Marjorie Alyse de Crossland em 20 de agosto de 1525, em Raskelfe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 13 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de fevereiro de 1548, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Calvert родился 2 июля 1500 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Walter Calvert было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Margery Ewnes, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Marjorie Alyse de Crossland 20 августа 1525 г. в местности раскелф, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 13 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 9 февраля 1548 г. в возрасте 47 лет.

es.2 July 1500–9 February 1548: 2 de julio de 1500–9 de febrero de 1548
es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Calvert nació el 2 de julio de 1500, en Inglaterra, su papá, Walter Calvert, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Margery Ewnes, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Marjorie Alyse de Crossland el 20 de agosto de 1525, en Raskelfe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 13 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 9 de febrero de 1548, a la edad de 47 años.
